metadata.source: U.S. Census Bureau, ACS 5-Year Subject Table S1501

variables_used.S1501_C01_014E: Population 25+ with HS graduate or higher

derived_fields.publicSchoolRatingAvg: PROXY: clamp(pctBachelorOrHigher / 6.0, 0, 10). NOT a real rating.
derived_fields.studentTeacherRatio: NCES CCD, enrollment-weighted CBSA average, SY 2021-22 (absent for 14 PR/HI micropolitan areas where Urban portal returns no district-level CBSA mapping)

nces_ccd.source: Urban Institute Education Data Portal mirror of NCES CCD district directory

skipped_districts.no_cbsa: cbsa == -2 (not in any CBSA) — rural / territorial districts
